name: Animal Bomb Chess
short_description: This is a Chess games. You can choose your animal at the beginning of the game. animals with their own characteristics, manipulate them to obtain props on the map, and use them. Although the process may test one's luck, you must still make every effort to survive until the end.
detailed_description: This is a Chess games. You can choose your animal at the beginning of the game. animals with their own characteristics, manipulate them to obtain props on the map, and use them. Although the process may test one's luck, you must still make every effort to survive until the end.  Shuttles through the landmines, wears your equipment. Survives until the end or takes the lead in crossing the line will win the ultimate victory. After victory, you can harvest coins and use them to unlock new animal companions in the store. I hope players can enjoy the process of playing and experience the joy brought by the game.
